title: Contact for paid integration

posts.author: Roxanab (Roxana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am interested in an automated integration for my website with Monday (paid integration).

We use Monday for sale activity and our goal is to automatically fill all data per client, from Monday in our website, when we change clients group in Monday (from „leads„ to „sold” group).

I already contacted team Monday with no success on this subject.
Do you have new directions or tips for me in order to obtain an estimated time and budget for this integration?

Thank you!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Roxanab and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Monday does not provide this service. Having said that, you can contact an expert to help you build your integration

Hope that helps!

Cheers,
-Matias
